component.name: KyPost
component.summary: Relay-based email client for KDE Plasma and Plasma Mobile

description.p: KyPost is a relay-only email client for KDE Plasma and Plasma Mobile. It does not speak IMAP or SMTP directly; instead, all mail and contacts sync through the mail.urlxl.com relay backend, which also brokers device pairing and push notifications over UnifiedPush.

The app provides an inbox and message detail view, a plain-text composer for replying, forwarding, and sending new mail, and a contacts list with a detail/edit view. Pairing a new device with the relay account is done by pasting or opening a pairing link, and sensitive account actions can be approved or denied from a multi-factor approval screen delivered via push notification.
